bead.title: Wire review evidence events into execute-bead-loop telemetry pipeline
bead.description: ddx agent metrics review-outcomes returns empty results despite reviews running. Review verdicts are recorded as kind:review events on beads, but attribution requires a kind:routing event to precede each review on the same bead. Verify and fix the wiring so that every execution that proceeds to review has both a routing event and a review event on the bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. After a successful execute-bead + review cycle, the bead has both a kind:routing event (with resolved_provider and resolved_model in body) AND a kind:review event (with APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES/BLOCK in summary).
2. ddx agent metrics review-outcomes returns non-empty rows when review events exist.
3. Integration test: mock executor returns success, mock reviewer returns APPROVE -> computeReviewOutcomes returns 1 row with approvals=1 for the correct tier.
4. Integration test: mock executor returns success, mock reviewer returns REQUEST_CHANGES -> computeReviewOutcomes returns 1 row with rejections=1.
5. cd cli && go test -run TestReviewEvidence ./... && go build .
